productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women White & Blue Night suits
description: Style Note Perfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit. Product Details White V-neck pyjama top with short puffed sleeves with piping, vents at the hem and graphic print with diamante embellishment on chest. Matching capri pyjama bottoms in turquoise, white and navy blue checks, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sides Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or print Tumble dry, normal, low heat Iron low and dry in shade Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
